steps.title: Find an increase in ice days
steps.content: The researcher needs an example that goes against the general decline in surface-ice duration. The correct data point must show more ice days in winter 2005-06 than in winter 1980-81.

steps.title: Reject non-increase evidence
steps.content: Choice A includes lakes that do not both show the needed increase. Choice C states a starting value rather than an increase over time. Choice D gives a 2005-06 threshold but does not compare it with 1980-81. The answer is B.
